hero.eyebrow: Built for Sudanese merchants · Works offline
hero.sub: A complete point-of-sale for restaurants and shops in Sudan. Accepts Bankak and cash, handles VAT, and keeps selling when the internet — or the power — drops.

feat.sub: One app for the till, inventory, staff and reports — designed for the realities of Sudan, not a Dubai trade-show booth.
feat.f1B: Power cuts and patchy 4G don't stop your till. Every sale is stored on-device and syncs automatically the moment you reconnect.
feat.f1L1: Encrypted local storage · zero data loss
feat.f2T: For restaurants. For shops. For both.
feat.f2B: Restaurants get a clean menu without inventory complexity. Shops get full stock tracking with barcodes. The system shapes itself to how you actually work.
feat.f3T: Bankak, cash, bank transfer. One receipt.
feat.f3B: Accept Sudan's most-used wallet alongside cash. Every payment method on the same receipt, every sale recorded automatically in reports.

how.sub: No installation, no servers, no salesperson at your door. Open the app and start selling.
how.s1B: Phone, OTP, business name. That's it — no paperwork, no salesperson.
how.s2B: Type a few items or import a list. Categories, prices and stock all in one screen.
how.s3B: Hand the phone to your cashier. Sales, receipts and reports are running from minute one.

price.sub: No hidden fees. No transaction cuts. Cancel any time.
price.p1B: Everything you need to start selling today.
price.p2B: For growing shops that need more horsepower.
price.p3B: For chains with multiple branches and devices.

foot.tag: A point of sale built for Sudanese merchants. Sell anywhere — phone, tablet, or counter.
